commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ddd37e11875dfac87b03ccebbdd00f0bdad25f29)
commands.review_summary:
The PR removes `argsMenu: "auto"` from the built-in `/usage` command registration while leaving the native command name and usage handler in place.

PR surface: Source -1. Total -1 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the PR defect: `/usage full` supplies the `mode` argument, so `resolveCommandArgMenu` returns `null` and bypasses the menu this PR removes. A live Docker/Telegram/OpenAI Codex reproduction of the original report was not run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the canonical same-regression fix and require contributor Telegram proof; automation cannot supply the external setup proof for this branch.

target.title: fix(usage): remove argsMenu: auto from /usage command to fix Telegram toggle
target.body:
## Problem

`/usage` bare command on Telegram (no `mode` argument) toggles the usage footer display. Since the introduction of `argsMenu: "auto"` on the `/usage` command registration, the Telegram native handler recognizes `argsMenu` and delivers the command as a native menu instead of falling through to the chat handler — so `responseUsage` is never toggled.

## Root Cause

In `src/auto-reply/commands-registry.shared.ts`, the `/usage` command was defined with `argsMenu: "auto"`. This tells the Telegram native handler to render the `/usage` command as an inline menu (tapping a button), rather than forwarding it as a chat message that triggers the `usage` handler. When a user types `/usage` without arguments, they expect the usage footer to toggle — but the menu mode intercepts the delivery and the footer never toggles.

## Fix

Remove `argsMenu: "auto"` from the `/usage` command registration. The `nativeName` and parameter definitions are preserved. When `argsMenu` is absent, `resolveCommandArgMenu()` returns `undefined`, so the command is delivered as a normal chat command through the existing handler path — restoring the toggle behavior.

**Diff (1 line removed):**
```diff
-      argsMenu: "auto",
```

## Real Behavior Proof

### Test Results (vitest 4.1.8, Node v22.22.0)

```
✓ |auto-reply| src/auto-reply/commands-registry.test.ts (31 tests, 100% pass)
  ✓ commands registry > does not enable restricted commands from inherited flags
  ✓ commands registry > appends skill commands when provided
  ✓ commands registry args > resolves auto arg menus when missing a choice arg
  ✓ commands registry args > keeps verbose full available while preserving no-arg status dispatch
  ✓ commands registry args > does not show menus when arg already provided
  ... 31/31 passed, 11.56s
```

### Fix verified
- `argsMenu: "auto"` removed from `/usage` command → `resolveCommandArgMenu()` returns undefined
- `/usage full` still works (supplies `mode` arg, menu branch bypassed)
- All 31 command registry tests pass with no regressions
target.author: mazhuima

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
